summary: Datasheet-derived draft for STMicroelectronics VL53L0CXV0DH/1. Interface: I²C control/data interface on SDA/SCL, up to 400 kHz, default device address 0x52; XSHUT reset/shutdown input; GPIO1 open-drain interrupt output. Package: Optical LGA12, 12 pads, 4.4 x 2.4 x 1 mm.

main_component.purpose: Main IC extracted from datasheet/reference sources for VL53L0CXV0DH/1.
main_component.assignment_reason: Symbol pin map is generated from cited datasheet/reference-design extraction.

support_components.purpose: AVDD external supply decoupling for VL53L0X.
AVDD external supply bulk/decoupling capacitor for VL53L0X.
I²C SDA pull-up for AVDD = 2.8 V and 400 kHz I²C clock; pull-ups are typically fitted only once per bus, near the host.
support_components.assignment_reason: Extracted from datasheet/reference-design evidence: S2P5C1, S2P15C1

support_components.purpose: I²C SCL pull-up for AVDD = 2.8 V and 400 kHz I²C clock; pull-ups are typically fitted only once per bus, near the host.
support_components.assignment_reason: Extracted from datasheet/reference-design evidence: S2P5C1, S2P15C1

support_components.purpose: XSHUT pull-up when host state is not known or when host does not control XSHUT; XSHUT must always be driven.
support_components.assignment_reason: Extracted from datasheet/reference-design evidence: S2P5C1, S2P13C1, S2P19C1

support_components.purpose: GPIO1 interrupt open-drain pull-up when the interrupt output is used.
support_components.assignment_reason: Extracted from datasheet/reference-design evidence: S2P4C1, S2P5C1, S2P12C1

assumptions: This recipe was extracted from downloaded datasheet/reference-design sources.
Every generated pin and support component must keep a source citation.
KiCad export is blocked if the extracted evidence is incomplete.

validation_warnings.message: This AI-proposed circuit was extracted from datasheet/reference sources and still needs review.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Check every cited pin, passive value, symbol, footprint, and package before fabrication.

validation_warnings.message: DNC pin 8 must be left floating; do not route it.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: XSHUT must always be driven to avoid leakage current; XSHUT should be high only when AVDD is on.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: I²C pull-ups are normally fitted only once per bus near the host; do not duplicate them if the host board already provides them.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: The 1.5 kOhm to 2 kOhm I²C pull-up recommendation is specifically stated for AVDD = 2.8 V and 400 kHz operation.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: GPIO1 should be left unconnected if not used.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.

validation_warnings.message: AVDD capacitors should be placed as close as possible to AVDDVCSEL and AVSSVCSEL module pins.
validation_warnings.fix_hint: Open the cited source chunk in the export notes and verify manually.
